film.title: Son of Sardaar
film.overview: A Punjabi man returning to India falls in love with a woman whose family welcomes him as a guest before realizing he is the man they need to kill in order to avenge their loved ones.

dialogues.dialogue: Hi, I am Sardar Manto Singh. And I am Jassi, hi. Do you feel ashamed to say Sardar Jassi? Sardar, you're really intelligent. You're a Sardar, I am a Sardar and the rest are good for nothing.
Your image dwells in my heart. Let me show you. I can sacrifice my pride and honor on you. You're so gorgeous, you.."You're so gorgeous, you're lucky for me." The moon's shining bright.
Your image dwells in my heart. Let me show you. I can sacrifice my pride and honour on you. You're so gorgeous, you're lucky for me. Don't gamble with me.
The heart's skipping a beat. I can build a bigger Taj for you. I can sacrifice my pride and honour on you. You're so gorgeous, you're lucky for me. if you're a man.
The heart's skipping a beat. I'll  build a temple for you in my heart. I can sacrifice my pride and honour on you. You're so gorgeous, you're lucky for me. Listen. Listen.
